steps.t: Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should dispose of mining-bombs found in Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should dispose of a mining-bomb found near the lower bridge in Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should dispose of another mining-bomb found near the lower bridge in Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should find the upper bridge in Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should dispose of a mining-bomb found near the upper bridge in Sundergrót.
